review_snippet: Manuel Antonio is perfect for families — wildlife trails, beaches, and pools all within 10 minutes of each other.
Costa Rica packs extraordinary biodiversity into a small country. Arenal Volcano, Monteverde cloud forest, and Manuel Antonio national park cover every family preference.
Took our kids (8 and 12) to Costa Rica last summer. Zip-lining in Monteverde was the highlight. Budget-friendly if you stay outside main tourist zones.
Ubud for culture and rice terraces, Seminyak for beach and shopping, Uluwatu for surf — Bali genuinely has something for everyone.
Bali offers a remarkable blend of Hindu temples, terraced rice paddies, world-class surf, and a vibrant arts scene. Budget options widely available.
Lisbon has the best food scene in Europe for vegetarians right now. Pasteis de Belem, the Alfama district, and the tram rides are unmissable.
Portugal offers dramatic Atlantic coastlines, medieval castles, Moorish architecture and some of the best seafood in Europe — remarkable value vs. other Western European destinations.
Sintra with kids was magical. Easy day trip from Lisbon. The Pena Palace looks like a fairy tale. Very manageable for mixed-age groups.
San Gimignano, Siena, and the Chianti wine region — Tuscany for couples is as romantic and culturally rich as anywhere in the world.
Tuscany's rolling hills, hilltop towns, world-class art and extraordinary food and wine make it one of Europe's great slow-travel destinations.
The Great Migration is one of the greatest wildlife spectacles on earth. We saw lions, cheetahs, and hundreds of elephants in a single day.
The Serengeti remains the gold standard of African safari destinations. Year-round game viewing with the wildebeest migration peaking June-August.
Ha Long Bay, Hoi An, and Hanoi street food — Vietnam is impossibly good value and incredibly diverse. One of the best budget adventure destinations in Asia.
Vietnam stretches over 1600km and packs in everything from limestone karsts and rice paddies to beaches, ancient towns and buzzing cities.
Seoul is a city that genuinely never sleeps. Street food in Myeongdong, K-pop shopping in Hongdae, and the palaces are all within subway reach.
Gyeongbokgung Palace in the morning, Bukchon Hanok Village after, Namdaemun market for lunch — Seoul rewards walkers enormously. Museum of Contemporary Art is world-class.
We stayed at a water villa in North Male Atoll. The house reef had turtles, rays, and reef sharks every snorkel session. Worth every penny for a honeymoon.
The Maldives offers extraordinary overwater bungalows, house reefs teeming with marine life, and some of the clearest water on the planet. Best for couples seeking seclusion.
Plitvice Lakes for hiking, Split for Roman ruins, Dubrovnik for Game of Thrones fans — Croatia covers culture, hiking and beach in one compact country.
Viking River Cruise from Budapest to Amsterdam was the perfect pace for my parents. Everything is included, no luggage hauling, and the towns are fascinating.
